projectDescription: An AI-powered consciousness elevation platform that uses journaling, synchronicity generation, ancient wisdom, and shadow integration to support personal growth and self-awareness.
keyFeatures: Consciousness Mapping — AI analyzes journal entries to surface emotional frequency, growth edges, and flow triggers
Synchronicity Engine — Generates meaningful resource recommendations, practices, and contemplation questions
Ancient Wisdom — Bridges diverse philosophical traditions (Buddhist, Stoic, Taoist, etc.) to modern situations
Shadow Integration — Compassionate AI-guided exploration of personal blind spots and unconscious patterns
Collective Coherence — Tracks simulated global consciousness participation and logs personal practices
Consciousness Feed — AI-generated news items across science, wisdom, transformation, and environment categories
Presence Protocols — Digital Sabbath reminders encouraging users to close the app and live fully
Radical Transparency — Full disclosure of how the AI works, what data is stored, and the tech stack
Notes — Persistent journal entry storage via Supabase
Rate-limited backend — Express.js proxy with 30 req/min per IP, powered by Perplexity AI (sonar model)
publicApiSurface: GET /api/health — Backend health check and AI availability status
POST /api/consciousness/map — Analyze journal text and return frequency, growth edges, flow triggers, patterns, next step
POST /api/synchronicity — Generate resources, practice, question, and connection archetype for a given interest
POST /api/wisdom — Retrieve teaching, practice, reframe, and tradition context for a situation
POST /api/shadow — Shadow integration with reflection, origin, exploration question, reframe, and professional guidance
POST /api/feed — Generate 6 consciousness-related news items across 6 categories
POST /api/intention — Generate daily intention with morning practice, midday check-in, and evening reflection
POST /api/generate — Generic AI generation endpoint with custom prompt, systemContext, and feature tag
generateContent(prompt, systemContext?, feature?) — Frontend API client function
